title: Working with PsyToolkit surveys and experiments
text: Current Release install current release, use following R code: Latest master branch version can also download latest source code compile package . Please note, RTools required compiling source code.

title: Working with PsyToolkit surveys and experiments
text: first, download survey experiment results PsyToolkit website. receive .ZIP file. Move file current R working directory. R, load psytoolkittools package run load.survey(filename) function. example: function returns data frame survey answers. folder called “psy_data” created. delete folder necessary loading experiment data.

title: Working with PsyToolkit surveys and experiments
text: easily load experiment data, package provides load.experiment.data() function. functions requires two arguments: - Column experiment data file names - Vector strings correspond structure saved experiment data function returns data frame can combined survey data frame passing function.

title: Working with PsyToolkit surveys and experiments
text: PsyToolkit, saving keys, pressed key saved instead position key defined saved. analysis, can helpful reverse saved value name original key pressed participant. case recode.keys() can used. function takes parameters. first vector column shall recoded. second parameter vector characters characters line experiment code. example:
code: #experiment code ... keys 1 2 3 4 space ... #R code recode.keys(data, c("1", "2", "3", "4", "space"))

title: Working with PsyToolkit surveys and experiments
text: PsyToolkit experiments, status 1 represents correct 2 incorrect answer. 3 represents time . recode.status(), status codes can recoded custom values. Example:

title: Load Experiment — load.experiment
text: function loads experiment data PsyToolkit experiment Therefore, vector file names vector labels represents structure experiment file provided. experiment data located `psy_data/experiment_data` directory. Otherwise, loading experiment fail.

title: Load Experiment — load.experiment
text: experiment.file.names vector experiment file names label.structure vector labels represents structure saved experiment value merge.dataframe result function can directly added existing data frame (e.g. survey data). default value NA.

title: Load Survey — load.survey
